description: Selection control with a list of options

options.description: Array of strings (auto-tagged 1-based) or [{title, tag}] dicts. May include {section: 'Name'} and {divider: true} entries.

pickerStyle.description: 'wheel' is iOS only; 'radioGroup' is macOS only

horizontalRadioGroupLayout.description: Horizontal layout for radioGroup style; macOS only; defaults to false

value.description: Tag of the selected option; 1-based index string for simple arrays
